title: EQ - Custom EQ, save a custom EQ, change some values, Save EQ
scenario: Verify that after modifying a saved custom EQ and clicking "Save EQ" again, the updated values are correctly persisted.
steps: Create or load a custom EQ preset.
Adjust some EQ values (e.g., frequency bands, gain, Q-factor).
Click the 'Save EQ' button to save the preset.
Change some EQ values again (different positions/values from the previous save).
Click the 'Save EQ' button again to overwrite the existing preset.
Close and reopen the EQ interface, or reload the preset.
Verify that the new positions/values (from the second save) are correctly displayed and applied.
expected: After saving the custom EQ a second time, the EQ should retain and display the latest saved values/positions correctly upon reloading.
